title: Zapier Merge/Upsert Metric Method with Fuzzy Search and Alias Management
description:
Design and implement a merge/upsert metric method for Zapier/MCP integration, enabling AI agents to create, update, and merge metrics programmatically.

### Requirements
- Metric search function with fuzzy matching across metric names and aliases
- Merge capability: commit an alias or update into an existing metric
- Upsert semantics: create if not found, update if exists

### API Capabilities
| Scenario | Supported |
|---|---|
| Create metric without aliases | Yes |
| Create metric with aliases | Yes |
| Add aliases to existing metric | Yes (via metric_id) |
| Update aliases on existing metric | Yes (old aliases replaced) |
| Delete aliases | Yes (by resending the aliases list) |
| Update metric logic | Yes (system='default' unless extended) |
| Update only metric fields | Yes (partial update) |

### Payload
Requires the public-facing ID of the primary metric and a list of metric IDs to merge into it.
acceptance_criteria: Upsert endpoint creates new metrics or updates existing ones
Fuzzy search finds metrics by name and alias
Aliases can be added, updated, or removed via the API
Merge merges secondary metrics into a primary metric
API works from Claude/AI agent via MCP
middleware_changes: New upsert/merge metric logic supporting create, update, alias management, and metric merging via API.
api_changes: New REST API endpoint for metric upsert/merge with alias management. Supports partial updates and full metric lifecycle operations.
implementation_notes: Upsert covers the merge use case. Developer confirmed upsert working from Claude (AI agent) via MCP. API uses system='default' for logic unless extended to other systems.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed the API design: primary metric ID plus list of merge-target IDs. Implemented an upsert endpoint covering all scenarios (create, update, alias management). Verified functionality from Claude via MCP integration.
